hero.headline: Stronger starts here
hero.subheadline: Group classes, personal training, and a community that shows up. First class is on us.

featured.name: Group Classes
featured.description: From HIIT to yoga, our schedule has something for every fitness level. Small class sizes mean real coaching.

featured.name: Personal Training
featured.description: One-on-one programming designed around your goals, your schedule, and your body.

featured.name: Open Gym
featured.description: Full access to equipment during all operating hours. No waiting, no crowds.

testimonials.name: Chris W.
testimonials.text: I've tried every gym in town. This is the first one where I actually look forward to showing up. The coaches know your name.

testimonials.name: Aisha J.
testimonials.text: The 6 AM HIIT class changed my mornings. Great energy, smart programming, and I'm out the door by 7.

testimonials.name: Tom H.
testimonials.text: Signed up for personal training after a back injury. Marcus worked with my PT to build a program that got me back to full strength.

team.name: Marcus Rivera
team.title: Head Coach & Owner
team.bio: CSCS certified with 10 years of coaching experience. Marcus builds programs that are challenging, safe, and scalable for any level.

team.name: Priya Patel
team.title: Yoga & Mobility Coach
team.bio: RYT-500 certified. Priya's classes blend traditional yoga with modern mobility work. Her Wednesday noon class has a waitlist.

team.name: Jamie Okonkwo
team.title: Spin & Boxing Coach
team.bio: Former amateur boxer turned fitness coach. Jamie's classes are high-energy and meticulously programmed.
